column1: ## 1. Every entry here was fetched from an authoritative source, NOT from training data
## 2. The "retrieved" date is when the value was actually looked up
## 3. Multiple sources for the same measurement are encouraged (cross-check)
## 4. This file is the ONLY place where "verified" means "independently confirmed"
## ABBREVIATED NUCLEON MASSES (used in derived quantity descriptions)
## CONFIDENCE LEVELS (structural, not numeric — but tracked for coverage)
## Format: measurement-atom <TAB> source <TAB> value <TAB> uncertainty <TAB> retrieved
## PARTICLE MASSES — NIST CODATA 2022 (energy equivalents in MeV)
## STRUCTURAL PERCENTAGES (not measurements — tracked for coverage)
## UNCERTAINTIES (these appear as atoms in domain output)
